name: buttercream frosting
instructions: beat 1 cup butter (room temp) until pale and fluffy (~3 min). gradually add 3-4 cups powdered sugar. add 1 tsp vanilla, pinch of salt, 2-4 tbsp milk or heavy cream until you hit the texture you want.
notes: powdered sugar, not granulated. butter must be room temp — too cold and it won't whip, too warm and it slumps.
